creator: bms@spc.org
text:
The modules subdirectory makefile for the 'linprocfs' kernel
	module is not present in the CURRENT branch of FreeBSD.

Fix: 

Copying the makefile from a checkout of STABLE cured the problem.
How-To-Repeat: 	Include 'linprocfs' in a 'makeoptions MODULES_OVERRIDE' directive
	in your kernel configuration.
